$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
title: Config
description:
Config represents the top-level configuration for credentials management.
It contains repository configurations and consumer definitions.

consumers.description: Consumers defines the consumers and their associated credentials

repositories.description: Repositories contains configuration entries for repositories

type.description: Type specifies the type of the configuration

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Consumer
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description:
Consumer represents a consumer of credentials with associated identities and credentials.
It supports both single and multiple identity configurations.

credentials.description: Credentials contains the list of credentials associated with this consumer

identities.description: Identities contains the list of identities associated with this consumer

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: RepositoryConfigEntry
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description:
RepositoryConfigEntry represents a single repository configuration entry.
It contains the raw repository configuration data.

repository.description: Repository contains the raw repository configuration data
